notes: Pendle wraps yield-bearing tokens (sUSDe, weETH, ezETH, swETH) into PT/YT pairs and prices them via internal SY/PT TWAP. PT-* tokens are listed as collateral on Aave + Morpho with custom oracle adapters; Penpie / Equilibria are vePENDLE aggregators (note: Penpie was the source of the 2024 $27M aggregator exploit, not Pendle itself).
